title: epistephium praestans var. album
intro: Epistephium praestans var. album, also known as the white epistephium orchid, is a species of orchid found in the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Epistephium praestans var. album include reducing pain and inflammation, treating wounds and infections, and aiding in the management of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
